# FaceOverlay

> FaceOverlay is a macOS app by Kuip Limited that keeps a live webcam window floating above the desktop for demos, calls, screen sharing, and recorded walkthroughs.

## Product Summary

FaceOverlay is a native macOS application focused on a simple use case: showing your face while you present your screen without requiring a full broadcast or streaming setup.

## Key Features

- Floating webcam overlay window on macOS
- Resizable and movable camera window
- Optional always-on-top behavior
- Optional desktop-following behavior across Spaces
- Adjustable opacity and corner roundness
- Camera selection and mirror toggle
- Background blur

## Platform

- macOS

## Download

- Mac App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6762126517

## Company

- Developer: Kuip Limited
- Privacy Policy: https://faceoverlay.provable.dev/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://faceoverlay.provable.dev/terms
